title: Initial outreach — Ore to Shore MTB Epic (Aug 8, Marquette MI)
description: Score 75 — PRIORITY. Michigan's largest MTB race, 2500 riders, $9,900 projected revenue. No confirmed official photographer. Contact via oretoshore.com contact form. Pitch BermSnap as event photographer — reference nonprofit mission, trail-building support, rider community value.
contact_resolved: oretoshore@gmail.com — confirmed via FAQs page (race changes email). Phone: 866-370-7223.

title: Research Yankee Springs TT — confirm photographer situation & decision timeline
description: Score 56 — near-term (Apr 25, 54 days out). 750 riders, longest-running MI MTB race. Check if official photographer exists. If not, initiate contact ASAP — this event is coming up fast. Also: WMMBA organizes MORC series year-round — a relationship here could unlock multiple events.

title: Confirm home base location for travel_friction calibration
description: All travel penalties calculated from Detroit, MI. If BermSnap is based elsewhere (or willing to travel more aggressively for high-revenue events), scores on WI/OH events change significantly. Confirm: (1) home base city, (2) max acceptable one-way travel for a booked event. This affects 11 of 12 pipeline events.

title: Research Mohican 100 MTB — confirm photo coverage & OMBC series fit
description: Score 53. 600 riders, 3h from Detroit. OMBC has 10+ races/year across Ohio — if Mohican has no official photographer, this could be a strong series partnership. Check ombc.net and ridemohican.com for photo vendor info.

title: Configure Brave Search API key
description: COMPLETED — API key configured. Weekly discovery now automated.
